issue.title: [Feature]: Add explicit Stack metadata fields to issue templates
issue.body:
## Work Type

Issue-template ergonomics for Stack routing.

Stack Type: feature
Stack Area: github

## Problem / Goal

Voyager issue authors need optional Stack metadata fields so Stack can avoid ambiguous weighted classification.

## Context

Template text mentions docs, automation, GitHub, tests, workflow, labels, and issue routing, which can otherwise create area ties.

## Expected Outcome

The issue template includes optional Stack Type and Stack Area fields with allowed values documented.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Blueprint accepts issues that include the optional Stack metadata fields.
- [ ] Stack uses the explicit fields before weighted signals.

## Reproduction Steps / Task Plan

1. Create an issue from the template.
2. Fill Stack Type and Stack Area.
3. Verify Blueprint and Stack results.

## Priority

P2 - reduces manual Stack cleanup.

## Requester / Owner

Requester: @frankyxhl
Owner: Iterwheel Stack
